THEINSATIABLE-QUICK_SAND_POWER.title: Quicksand
THEINSATIABLE-QUICK_SAND_POWER.descripti:
Each layer of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] reduces attack damage by [blue]4%[/blue].
Halved at the start of each turn, rounded down.
Multiplies with [gold]Weak[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-QUICK_SAND_POWER.smartDesc:
Reduces attack damage by [blue]{OnPlayer:{quicksand2}|{quicksand1}}%[/blue].
Halved at the start of each turn, rounded down.
THEINSATIABLE-TEST_THE_STONES_POWER.desc: Gain [gold]Imbalance[/gold] until the end of this turn.
THEINSATIABLE-TEST_THE_STONES_POWER.smar: Gain [gold]Imbalance[/gold] until the end of this turn.
THEINSATIABLE-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.des: Lose [gold]Thorns[/gold] before the start of your next turn.
THEINSATIABLE-TEMPORARY_THORNS_POWER.sma: Lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] layers of [gold]Thorns[/gold] before the start of your next turn.
THEINSATIABLE-AVOID_PREDATORS_POWER.desc: For [blue]1[/blue] turn, you are unaffected by [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Fragile[/gold] applied by enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-AVOID_PREDATORS_POWER.smar: For [blue]{Amount}[/blue] turns, you are unaffected by [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], [gold]Weak[/gold], and [gold]Fragile[/gold] applied by enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SEDIMENTATION_POWER.title: Sedimentation
THEINSATIABLE-TENDER_TOXIC_POWER.title: Tender Toxic
THEINSATIABLE-TENDER_TOXIC_POWER.descrip: For each card you play this turn, ALL enemies lose [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-TENDER_TOXIC_POWER.smartDe: For each card you play this turn, ALL enemies lose [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]{Amount}[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-DRUG_RESISTANCE_POWER.desc: You are immune to negative effects gained during this combat.
THEINSATIABLE-DRUG_RESISTANCE_POWER.smar: You are immune to negative effects gained during this combat.
THEINSATIABLE-CRYSTAL_CLEAR_POWER.title: Crystal Clear
THEINSATIABLE-CRYSTAL_CLEAR_POWER.descri: Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold], deal [blue]3[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-CRYSTAL_CLEAR_POWER.smartD: Whenever you apply [gold]Quicksand[/gold], deal [blue]{Amount}[/blue] damage to ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SCORCHED_EARTH_POWER.title: Scorched Earth
THEINSATIABLE-SCORCHED_EARTH_POWER.descr: Each layer of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] also increases damage taken from attacks by [blue]4%[/blue].
THEINSATIABLE-SCORCHED_EARTH_POWER.smart: Each layer of [gold]Quicksand[/gold] also increases damage taken from attacks by [blue]{scorchedearth}%[/blue].
THEINSATIABLE-MUDDY_POWER.title: Muddy
THEINSATIABLE-MUDDY_POWER.description: [gold]Quicksand[/gold] effects on enemies are doubled by [blue]1[/blue] times.
THEINSATIABLE-MUDDY_POWER.smartDescripti: [gold]Quicksand[/gold] effects on enemies are doubled by [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times.
THEINSATIABLE-MOBILE_DUNE_POWER.title: Mobile Dune
THEINSATIABLE-MOBILE_DUNE_POWER.descript: At the start of your turn, evenly distribute [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers among ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-MOBILE_DUNE_POWER.smartDes: At the start of your turn, evenly distribute [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers among ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-SALIVATE_POWER.title: Salivate
THEINSATIABLE-SALIVATE_POWER.description: Whenever [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers are reduced, gain [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to the number of layers reduced.
THEINSATIABLE-SALIVATE_POWER.smartDescri: Whenever [gold]Quicksand[/gold] layers are reduced, gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] times [gold]Vigor[/gold] equal to the number of layers reduced.
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn as long as it is not broken.
[gold]Block[/gold] is not removed at the start of your turn as long as it is not broken.
THEINSATIABLE-WEATHERING_POWER.title: Weathering
THEINSATIABLE-WEATHERING_POWER.descripti:
At the start of your turn, draw [blue]1[/blue] additional card and randomly [red]Afflict[/red] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]: [purple]Weathering[/purple].
Your cards are immune to other [red]Afflictions[/red].
THEINSATIABLE-WEATHERING_POWER.smartDesc:
At the start of your turn, draw [blue]{Amount}[/blue] additional cards and randomly [red]Afflict[/red] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold]: [purple]Weathering[/purple].
Your cards are immune to other [red]Afflictions[/red].
THEINSATIABLE-INSATIABLE_NO_ESCAPE_POWER:
When you take unblocked attack damage, add an [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the end of your turn, if there are no [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], [gold]Devour[/gold] ALL enemies.

When you take unblocked attack damage, add an [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
At the end of your turn, if there are no [gold]Insatiable Swallow[/gold] cards in your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold], [gold]Hand[/gold], or [gold]Discard Pile[/gold], [gold]Devour[/gold] ALL enemies.
THEINSATIABLE-HIVE_MIND_POWER.title: Hive Mind
THEINSATIABLE-HIVE_MIND_POWER.descriptio: When you play a card, play all cards with the same name from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEINSATIABLE-HIVE_MIND_POWER.smartDescr: When you play a card, play all cards with the same name from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
